title: End workform based on answer
excerpt: I would like to be able to prohibit submitting a form based on conditions. For example we will ask a “yes” “no” question and it be conditional. If they answer “no” we want to show them a message and don’t want them to be…

posts.author: lgbt (Jason)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to prohibit submitting a form based on conditions. For example we will ask a “yes” “no” question and it be conditional. If they answer “no” we want to show them a message and don’t want them to be able to continue. I can’t seem to figure out how to do this.

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Seems impossible. You can setup condition when they select “No” on workforms. But the columns types would be which are available on monday.

RehanAQ | Implementation Consultant at codexsolutionsint.com
